text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, what's wrong, Tannhauser? You're
practically tearing your hair out.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Were you making some marvelous plans for the
school? Or do you want to practice sending
letters by arrow? Whatever it is, I'm here to listen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... Nature... I'm so worried about how I did
in the unit exam...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, but I'm so worried... The material in the
exam was pretty difficult this time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I really hope I didn't fail again! Please don't make
me do any more extra lessons!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What? What's so refreshing about this?! If you
know some secret way of calming down, please
teach meee!
